title: Strata Heavy Duty Large Storage Box with Lid, 190L, Lockable, Indoor/Outdoor. Black Box with Red Handles, Wheels
features: LARGE CAPACITY: Strata XXL Plastic Garden Storage Box and Lid offers an extra-large capacity of 190 Litres
DURABLE: Heavy-duty plastic construction provides a strong and reliable storage box
ADDED SECURITY: Lockable lid keeps contents safe and secure
WHEELS FOR CONVENIENCE: Features four wheels for easy manoeuvrability
MULTIPLE USES: Perfect for storing garden items, toys, and other items indoors and outdoors
description: Strata XXL Plastic Garden Storage Box with Lid - a heavy-duty solution for all your storage needs. With a generous capacity of 190 liters, this lockable storage box is designed for both indoor and outdoor use. Crafted from durable plastic, this storage box ensures strength and reliability, providing a secure space for your belongings. The lockable lid adds an extra layer of security, keeping your items safe and protected. For added convenience, the storage box is equipped with four wheels, allowing for easy maneuverability. Whether you're storing garden essentials, toys, or other items, this versatile box is up to the task. The dimensions of the box are perfectly suited for various items, measuring 98.2cm in length, 49.4cm in width, and 62.4cm in height. Weighing only 7.2 kg, it strikes the right balance between size and portability. Choose the Strata XXL Plastic Garden Storage Box for a reliable, spacious, and convenient storage solution. Organize your space effortlessly with this black storage box featuring eye-catching red handles.
